# `.github/ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`

Issue forms shown when someone opens a new issue.

| File | For |
|------|-----|
| `bug_report.md` | Reporting something that's broken (prefilled `fix:` title). |
| `feature_request.md` | Suggesting an idea or improvement (prefilled `feat:` title). |

↑ Back to the [project root](../../README.md).
